title: ctenopteris suprasculpta
intro: Ctenopteris suprasculpta, also known as the Toothed Fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Ctenopteris suprasculpta include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
